citation.description: raise_or_warn_env() called at top of load_config() before cache lookup; tombstoned env vars added to _env_signature(); warm-cache test at test_tombstone_registry.py:174

criteria.criterion: A RemovedInput tombstone registry exists and is applied at config discovery and CLI startup before defaults are chosen, at the top of load_config() before the _RESULT_CACHE lookup (so it fires on a warm cache hit) — verified by a test that sets a retired env var, primes the cache with a prior load_config(), and confirms the tombstone still fires.

citation.description: test_error_env_var_fails_loud and test_error_toml_key_fails_loud verify nonzero exit, old name, replacement, removed_in in message, no store mutation

criteria.criterion: Setting a store/security/policy/sync-affecting retired input (TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR, REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE, verify.require_verdict_for_close) fails with a nonzero exit and a message naming the old name, the replacement, and the removed-in release — verified by a table-driven test.

citation.description: test_warn_env_var_warns_not_errors captures logger via caplog and asserts REBAR_PUSH→REBAR_SYNC_PUSH in warning message, no raise

criteria.criterion: Operationally-inert retired inputs (REBAR_PUSH, REBAR_RECONCILER_LOCK_MAX_RETRIES, reconciler.lock_backend, …) warn rather than error — warning emitted via logging.warning on the rebar logger, naming old→replacement→removed-in. Verified by a sub-table in the table-driven test.

citation.description: test_removed_legacy_alias_raises (replacement for test_removed_legacy_alias_ignored) asserts RemovedInputError raised from tracker_dir_override(); _deprecations.py:116 defines RemovedInputError(BaseException)

criteria.criterion: The error-class tombstone raises a RemovedInputError (a BaseException subclass, not ConfigError/Exception) — verified by the rewritten test_config_tracker_dir.py test.

citation.description: test_llm_max_iters_tombstone sets env var, calls LLMConfig.from_env(), asserts RemovedInputError with REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS; implementation in llm/config.py:548-555

criteria.criterion: Setting REBAR_LLM_MAX_ITERS and calling LLMConfig.from_env() surfaces the tombstone (naming REBAR_LLM_MAX_STEPS) rather than silently ignoring it — verified by a dedicated test in the rebar.llm layer.

citation.description: test_mcp_write_fails_hard asserts RemovedInputError propagates from create_ticket(); test_mcp_server_broad_excepts_guard_removed_input_error reads mcp_server.py source and checks re-raise guard; mcp_server.py:312-318 implements the explicit re-raise before except Exception

criteria.criterion: The tombstone fails hard on the MCP-server path too — verified by an in-process test and a pytest that reads mcp_server.py and asserts every broad except has a RemovedInputError re-raise guard immediately above it.

citation.description: test_no_config_key_removed_without_a_tombstone and test_no_env_var_removed_without_a_tombstone load golden file and check every key is in live schema or tombstone/alias registry; golden file exists at tests/golden/config_surface.json

criteria.criterion: A CI/anti-regression check fails if a recognised config key / env var is removed without a corresponding tombstone entry — implemented as a pytest test diffing against tests/golden/config_surface.json.

citation.description: test_unknown_toml_key_keeps_forwardcompat_policy writes an unknown key and asserts exit 0 (warn, not error) from rebar list

criteria.criterion: A genuinely-unknown env var / TOML key keeps the existing forward-compat policy (WARN by default; error only under REBAR_CONFIG_UNKNOWN_KEYS=error).

citation.description: test_config_validate_reports_and_exits_nonzero asserts nonzero exit with TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR set and 0 on clean env; implementation in show_config.py:112-142 using scan_tombstones()

criteria.criterion: rebar config validate uses scan_tombstones(...) to walk the registry without raising, collects all matches, prints every tombstone/alias with old-name+replacement+removed-in, exits non-zero if any error-class input is present — verified by a test.

citation.description: Section 'Fail-loud tombstone registry for removed inputs (story 36c7)' contains 'tombstone registry' at line 395 and 'rebar config validate' at line 414; test_docs_config_md_documents_tombstones verifies both strings

criteria.criterion: docs/config.md documents the tombstone behaviour and the new rebar config validate command — verified by a pytest assertion that docs/config.md contains both 'tombstone' and 'rebar config validate'.

citation.description: Ticket comment attests change 704 (Change-Id Id3d839fb) LANDED on main via Gerrit — status MERGED — with LLM-Review +1 AND Verified +1 (GitHub Actions CI: build/test/lint/typecheck/module-size/golden-drift all green). Code structure is consistent and complete.

criteria.criterion: make lint && make typecheck && make test pass, and the change lands via the Gerrit two-vote gate.
